title: EMRS IN UTTAR DINAJPUR, WEST BENGAL
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Tribal Affairs

EMRS IN UTTAR DINAJPUR, WEST BENGAL

Posted On:
12 MAR 2026 4:31PM by PIB Delhi

Union Minister of State for Tribal Affairs Shri Durgadas Uikey informed Lok Sabha that
as per census 2011, block wise population
in Uttar Dinajpur district of West Bengal
is given below:

S.No.

CD Block Name

Total Population

ST Population

Percentage

1

Chopra

284403

20043

7%

2

Itahar

303678

25334

8%

3

Karandighi

368332

28773

8%

4

Raiganj

430221

27785

6%

5

Hemtabad

142056

6491

5%

6

Islampur

308518

8032

3%

7

Goalpokhar – I

326120

12595

4%

8

Goalpokhar – II

291252

17647

6%

9

Kaliaganj

224142

12675

6%

As per the existing guidelines of EMRS Scheme, EMRSs are sanctioned in blocks having more than 50% ST population and at least 20,000 tribal persons (as per the 2011 Census). None of the blocks in Uttar Dinajpur district meet the above twin criteria.

9 EMRSs have been sanctioned
in West Bengal
 out of which 8 EMRSs are operational. District wise status is given below:

S.No.

Name of District

Sanctioned



Operational

1



Grand Total

9
